steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The passage describes researchers addressing a shortcoming in their data coverage “after gaining new access to administrative records” from previously missing regions. The blank requires a word meaning to fix, improve, or remedy that shortcoming.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Ameliorate means to improve or make something better—the action researchers would take upon obtaining data that fills a geographic gap. The other choices are fundamentally incompatible: postulate means to propose, sanction means to authorize or penalize, and rationalize means to explain away or justify. That matches choice B — B is correct.
